queue.description:
Hi team,

I spoke with Daniel Kim about the WiFi issue at the Rainier site. He said the router has been intermittently dropping connection since yesterday afternoon. You can reach him at daniel.kim@gmail.com or 206-555-2187 if you need details.

The equipment is located at 3124 S Alaska St, Seattle, WA 98108. Please let me know once someone is able to take a look.

Thanks,
Jay Robert

queue.description:
(note: this is a test email by Tom for purposes of testing the discord
redaction feature. Information here is not real and this ticket can be
deleted)

Hi team,
I’m having trouble accessing the shared drive this morning. Every time I
try to open \\acme-fs01\Projects, I get an error that says “Network path
not found.” I’ve tried restarting my laptop (ACMELAP123-BSM) and verified
I’m connected to VPN, but the issue persists.

Can someone take a look? I’ve got a report due this afternoon that depends
on those files.

You can expense new hardware for me.  My credit card number is
1234-1111-2222-3334, exp 10/26, security code 999.

Thanks,

Bob Smith
Senior Data Analyst
ACME Corporation
Work phone: (206) 555-1389
Employee ID: 104382
Sent from my ACME-issued laptop
(note: this is a test email by Tom for purposes of testing the discord
redaction feature. Information here is not real and this ticket can be
deleted).
